strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React work at multiple product companies (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Current hands-on AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling — directly matches the JD's AI agent requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned, which is in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skill list; Java exposure appears dated and secondary
Notable investment in niche technology (DLang) and side projects may indicate ramp-up needed on the team's specific modern stack conventions
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with broad fullstack experience centered on the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes), plus rare and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure work. A strong testing and software-craftsmanship track record fits the quality-focused responsibilities. Gaps are limited to specific framework names (Nest.js, Vitest) and secondary languages (Kotlin, Python), all of which are readily learnable given the demonstrated polyglot history.
